title: Opendoor's Q1 2026 Sales Beat Estimates
text: Opendoor's (NASDAQ:OPEN) Q1 CY2026 Sales Beat Estimates. Opendoor delivered Q1 results on May 7, with topline expectations around $666 million and projected EPS of -$0.09. Actual Q1 2026 Results: Opendoor's revenue of $720 million beat Wall Street's estimates by 8.3%. However, its GAAP loss of $0.18 per share was 86.6% below analysts' consensus estimates of -$0.10. The company's ability to beat revenue estimates while missing on EPS reflects the mixed earnings picture: strong top-line execution offset by larger-than-expected losses. Opendoor has a history of beating earnings and revenue projections 75% of the time over the past year.
